title: Lebanon ceasefire Day 9: 4 killed in Israeli strikes despite 3-week extension
snippet: Israeli troops and Hezbollah fighters continued to target each other on Day 9 of ceasefire. 4 killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon. Both sides reporting violations. Ceasefire began April 16, extended for 3 weeks on April 23.
tag_reason: 4/24 Day 8 8명 사살(src-470) 후속. Day 9 추가 4명 사망. 일일 위반 패턴 지속.
